titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 1: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 1. (A.R. No. 287 of 1917.) KŪHŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west and south walls, central shrine, Amaravanēśvara temple.

This inscription appears to be a later copy (engraved in Rājarāja I's period). It is damaged in several places and the writing is also not very clear. It seems to refer to the grant of several plots of land to the god of Kūrur in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kshatriyasikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu. It is enjoined to apportion the yield of land for paying wages to several service personnel of the temple. A piece of land earmarked for conducting offerings and worship (archanābhōgam) to the god Tiruveḷḷarukkīsvaramuḍaiyār is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Uttamacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu kṣatriyaci kāmaṇivaḷa nāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu kūrur Ittevaramuṭaiyāṟku kku
kūruruṭaiyāṉ kūttan Ā nattanāṉa mum kup pallavaraiyaṉ Iṟaiyi yāna » 3likku Ataku I4 100 1 » 100taha

kku nipanta māvil Uṭaiyārkkut tiruvamutu 2m ci tu yārku cantikku Oru sandhikku 6 Umāsahitar tra Ira sandhikku
�m Āka �vra�kkum Acca nel �m Āvāṟkku neyyamutukku nel 3m vaṟkku vaṇṇata Ina� ykku nitta nel � Aṭaikkāyamutukku nitta

Abhiṣe ceyyum nampikku nitta nel �m Uṭaiyāṟkku parihāram ceyum māṇikaḷḷiruvarkku nitta nei paṭikku māṇikaḷiruvaṟkku nittai�çm Āka nitta ḷa 100� Abhiṣekañ ceyyun nampikku kkaṭa vacam kācu 2kku nellum kācu 2kku
nel sa�ka mā llukku kappaṭa vicam 4kku I Uram vitāṉaṅ koḷḷa Āṇṭu nellu Uram vantatukku dakṣaṇa vantatu snaṅ t tākkaḷ tukku I Āṇṭuvarai van=ta I Uṭaiyārkkup putiya ta ceyum nilaṉ cāttaṉkuṭi maṟuvāyiṉ mu� tiruveḷḷarukkiśvaramuṭaiyār Arccanāpokam kuḻiccey nila�m

nel pil poli kuṭuttu Iṟaiyili ceytum ni llai kkat tellaikku kiḻakkum mum maṭi kum tenpāṟkellai Ellaikkarampalan nenṟup per kūvappaṭṭa ṉṟu māvukku vaṭakku
nilaṉ �4 cuṟṟu viḷakku nilaṉ 4m Ukaccar Ā kku toṭṭattiṉ teṟkil nilaṉ ṭṭār vaṭakkil nilan vaṭakkil nilaṉ � teva tāṉam I pāṉukku paṉaiyūr vāy ca koṭṭa Aṭṭak kaṭavaḷayyum timalaic cey nilaṉ vacam kum teṟkum Āka Ivva
caṅku kāḷamāṟṟi yūtuvār nālvaṟkku nilaṉ paṉaiyūr vāyiṉ vaṭakkil ni tiṉa kuṭi maṟuvāyiṉ kiḻai kaṇaccaṉ � tiruppatiyam pāṭuvāriruvaṟkku Ivvākkāṉ karai nilaṉ Ivarkaḷukke paṉaiyūr vā yaṉ tekkil nilaṉ �m Ivarkaḷukke paṉaiyūr vā yaṉ tekkil nilaṉ �m Ivarkaḷukke paṉaiyūr vā vaṭakkil nilaṉ � 1m vāykkeḻviyuṭaiya kaṭikayāṉukkuppa nāṉkellaikku naṭuvapaṭṭa nilam kāl Inni
ṉaiyūr vāyiṉ vaṭakki nilaṉ � naṉtavānattil melainilaṉ �m karāṉa Uṭaiyāṟkku nittam paḷḷittāma nittamañcu vaṭamāṉa puṭai paṉaiyūr vāyiṉ ṟekkilk kollaiyuṭaṉ maṭa Ūrk kuḷattu kiḻakaraiy maṉaiyum toṭṭamum Iva(na)ṉukkey tiruviḻāṉāḷaikkum nica k kaḻañcu citāriyum Ōrāḷ pūṟai ṉīlu rup paṇiyumiṭap paṉaiyūr vāyin teṟkil maṉaiyum toṭṭamu Araṭṭan teṟki nilaṉ � Idevarkku ve kālukkum māttāl kācu Onṟu Ik kācu Añcum kkuppaṭṭu Ittiru vitimaṭappuṟam ceyvittukkoṇṭu

ṇṭum kucappaṇi ceyakaṭava veḷkovarku kāṭiyvāyir vaṭakkil nila�m Ūr kuḷattiṉ vaṭakkil nila kaṭṭani vāyin Irāśrībaliyiṉ minpūcuṟṟu viḷakkonṟe ṟaṭṭa
Ivvūr marakulavaṉukku kaṭampaṉ yiṉa vaṭakaṭai nirnilaṉ �m tirumer kāliśvaramuṭaiya kkut tiruvamutukku p pallava Iraāyaneṉ teva svastiśrī devarkku yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu Ivūr kuṭutta nilaṉ kiḻpāṟkellai tevar Ūr maliṟṟu kuṭutta nilaṉ kiḻpāṟkellai tevar kuḷamaṭaikku meṟkkum tenpāṟ
lai putukku puṟattukkum kaṭikaiyānṉilattukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kūruvāy nṟum teṟku nokkippoṉa vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārk kellai vāykku mikuti kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka nilaṉ vāykkeḻvi yiṉ Ūromukku A kaumār Ūromukku Aṭṭa kaṭava I cā�pa mūn_ṛumā Āṇṭuvarai patiṉmukkalane tūṇi patakku nilaṉ � 4 viṟṟu Iṟaiyi
nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 2 10 5 In nilattālum Innellālum vālamañci kuṭimai Eppeṟpaṭṭatum Ūrome Ivaṉukku kuṭuppomāṉom Ivarkaḷ colla Eḻuti madhyasthaṉ yaṉā 8 10 civabrāhma kadhya viyeṉṉeḻuttu .There is another piece which reads k kāṭivāyiṉ teṟkil nilaṉ m āṇṭuvarai nāṟkalam
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 1 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
